headline: Microchip: Growth Trend Improving After Major Plunge
summary: Microchip is turning the corner as inventories normalize and demand improves across MCU, analog, and FPGA markets, driving revenue recovery and margin expansion potential.

headline: Microchip Technology Earns IEC 62443-4-1 ML2 Industrial Automation and Control System Certification
summary: Secure Development Processes Advance CRA Readiness and Increase Customer Cybersecurity AssuranceCHANDLER, Ariz., April 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As connected systems spread across residential, industrial and commercial environments, the need for independently verified cybersecurity assurance is becoming a core requirement.
